```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct NetworkPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string username;
    std::vector<uint32_t> scores;
    std::string metadata;
};

NetworkPacket deserialize_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a non-const span from the const span
    std::span<uint8_t> non_const_buffer(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(non_const_buffer, non_const_buffer.size());
    NetworkPacket packet;

    // Read packet_id
    adaptor.read(&packet.packet_id);

    // Read username with prefixed adaptor
    packet.username = adaptor.read<std::string>();

    // Read scores: first read the count, then read the container
    uint32_t score_count;
    adaptor.read(&score_count);
    adaptor.read_container(packet.scores, score_count);

    // Read metadata as null-terminated string
    packet.metadata = adaptor.read<std::string>(hexi::null_terminated{});

    // Skip remaining bytes
    adaptor.skip(adaptor.size());

    return packet;
}

struct PacketInfo {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::string_view username;
};

PacketInfo extract_packet_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a non-const span from the const span
    std::span<uint8_t> non_const_buffer(buffer.data(), buffer.size());
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(non_const_buffer, non_const_buffer.size());
    PacketInfo info;

    // Use span() to get a view of the first 4 bytes (packet_id)
    auto id_span = adaptor.span<uint32_t>(1);
    info.packet_id = *id_span.data();

    // Read username using prefixed adaptor to get a string_view
    info.username = adaptor.read<std::string_view>();

    // Skip the scores vector: read the count and then skip the data
    uint32_t score_count;
    adaptor.read(&score_count);
    adaptor.skip(score_count * sizeof(uint32_t));

    return info;
}
```
